quote: One of the most thorough Flutter architects I've worked with. The codebase they left behind was clean enough that the junior team could maintain it without hand-holding.
author: Omar Alhalabi

quote: Delivered a pixel-perfect design system that cut our designer-developer iteration time in half. Every component was documented and accessible out of the box.
author: Kind Ali

quote: Set up our entire CI/CD pipeline in a week — Fastlane, code signing, automated testing, Firebase distribution. We went from zero automation to fully automated releases.
author: Mahmoud Alakkad

quote: The performance work alone was worth the engagement — cut our app startup time by 40% and eliminated the jank on our main feed screen completely.
author: Ahmad Kamal
